metadata.description: Claude Code marketplace for developjik plugins, including Harness Engineering and future workflow automation plugins.

plugins.name: harness-engineering
plugins.description: Extended PDCA(Plan→Design→Do→Check→Wrap-up) based AI software development automation plugin. 6 specialized agents (strategist, architect, engineer, guardian, librarian, debugger) and 13 execution skills with L0-L4 automation levels, multi-framework test runner, 4-tier verification classes, wave execution, and hash-anchored edits.

plugins.name: colo-fe-flow
plugins.description: Jira-first frontend workflow orchestrator for Colo. Routes work through clarify, plan, design, implement, check, iterate, and local docs sync using context from Jira, Confluence, Figma, and the codebase.
